The flight from Tokyo departs at 10:30 from terminal 2, gate 0036.
Product model number JPN-0010-2024 is the Japanese market variant.
Tokyo phone area code 03 must be dialled before the 8-digit number.
Japanese post codes are 7 digits, e.g., 100-0001 for central Tokyo.
Store code 0030 refers to the Shinjuku flagship store in our system.
Latitude 35.6762 degrees north, longitude 139.6503 degrees east (Tokyo).
Order placed at branch 005 of our online store on 15 September 2024.
Serial number JPN-00089-2024 is printed on the underside of the unit.
The exchange rate today is 149.50 JPY per USD on international markets.
Route 0001 connects Sapporo to Asahikawa via National Highway 12.
Document reference: 2024-JP-0138-REV2 for the amended specification.
Employee number 0036-00245 in the Osaka payroll system needs updating.
Catalogue page 0009, item 12, lists the spring collection accessories.
Platform 3 at Shinjuku Station serves the Yamanote Line direction north.
Company registration (法人番号): 1234567890123 — Ministry of Internal Affairs.
Station code for Shibuya in the Metro system is SB01 on the Fukutoshin Line.
The part number 0116-2024-A is compatible with models from 2019 onwards.
Booking reference code JPN2024-0289 is valid through the end of the year.
Building code 0150-A applies to Class A commercial structures over 10 floors.
Item barcode 4901234567890 is the standard JAN code for this product.
